settings.heading: Three gentle essentials for a nervous dog settling in
settings.intro: The first few weeks with a newly-adopted dog are the hardest — everything is unfamiliar and their nerves are close to the surface. This bundle brings together three of our calmest, most-reached-for tools to help them settle, sniff and unwind at their own pace.
settings.ticks: 30-day money-back guarantee | Dispatched fast · Free UK delivery over £35
